name: Salamandra Fusion
name_jp: サラマンドラ・フュージョン
desc: Equip only to a FIRE Warrior monster. It gains 700 ATK. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy this card instead. While this card is equipped to a Fusion Monster you control: You can send this card and the equipped monster to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Flame Swordsman" or 1 Fusion Monster that mentions it from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) You can only use this effect of "Salamandra Fusion" once per turn.
eff: Equip only to a FIRE Warrior monster. It gains 700 ATK. If the equipped monster would be destroyed by battle or card effect, you can destroy this card instead. While this card is equipped to a Fusion Monster you control: You can send this card and the equipped monster to the GY, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Flame Swordsman" or 1 Fusion Monster that mentions it from your Extra Deck. (This is treated as a Fusion Summon.) You can only use this effect of "Salamandra Fusion" once per turn.

action: Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends itself from field to Graveyard
mst: Prevents other cards being destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
Treats Special Summon as Fusion Summon
attack: Prevents other cards being destroyed by battle
misc: Equips only to a specific target
Requires control of specific Monster card type
